DOWNFALLU-D8.pages.BREAK.description:
[red][jitter]CRASH!!![/jitter][/red]
The octahedron shatters.

With [red][sine]blood[/sine][/red] dripping from your hand, you touch one of its fragments.
In a daze, you feel an [green][sine]ancient power[/sine][/green] flow into your body.
DOWNFALLU-D8.pages.INITIAL.description:
Passing through the mist, you arrive in a silent space.
At the center of the ruins, a [green]Mystical Octahedron[/green] floats quietly.
It rotates slowly, its surface constantly [blue][sine]glimmering[/sine][/blue], like some [gold][sine]ancient creation[/sine][/gold].

As you reach out, just about to touch its surface, the octahedron [blue][sine]suddenly flares[/sine][/blue], and a complex stream of runic light flashes across it.
You feel a [red][jitter]faint tremor[/jitter][/red] rise from the ground. The air around you turns [purple]heavy[/purple], and the entire space holds its breath, waiting for your action. You decide to...
DOWNFALLU-D8.pages.INITIAL.options.BREAK: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. Obtain a rare [gold]Offclass[/gold] card reward.
DOWNFALLU-D8.pages.INITIAL.options.TAKE_: You have no [gold]Overflow[/gold] cards that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-D8.pages.LEAVE.description: You decide that touching an unknown creation is too dangerous and leave.
DOWNFALLU-D8.pages.TAKE.description:
You take the octahedron.
Your body feels even [red][jitter]heavier[/jitter][/red] than before...
DOWNFALLU-D8.pages.loss: {character} was overcome by the great power of [gold]{event}[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-D8.title: Mystical Octahedron
DOWNFALLU-SUSPICIOUS_HOUSE.pages.INITIAL:
As you make your way through the Hive, you hear a [jitter][red]piercing[/red][/jitter] scream nearby. After investigating, you discover a [red]giant flying insect[/red] trying to quiet a serpentine creature.

Startled by the insect's screeching, the little one immediately [sine]shrinks into[/sine] a corner. Perhaps this insect has mistaken it for its own child, but it clearly wants no part of this.
DOWNFALLU-SUSPICIOUS_HOUSE.pages.LEAVE.d: The snake looks at you, deeply disappointed, but still smiles and wishes you safe travels.
Just as you draw the Ovicopter's attention away, the little snake opens its tiny jaws with [gold]lightning speed[/gold] and [red]clamps down[/red] hard on its finger!

Before it can shake the little one loose, you quickly step in and [red][jitter]throw a sudden punch[/jitter][/red], knocking it down. You call to the little snake, and it happily coils around your arm. The two of you continue traveling through the Spire together, and you decide to give it a name: [gold]"Clementine"[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-SUSPICIOUS_HOUSE.title: Misplaced Kindness
